name: create
context: Create GitHub repositories via POST /user/repos, POST /orgs/{org}/repos, or gh repo create
info: Create new GitHub repositories for users or organizations. Supports public and private repos, auto-initialization with README/LICENSE/.gitignore, template repositories, and configuring default settings on creation. Use the GitHub REST API `POST /user/repos` (personal) or `POST /orgs/{org}/repos` (organization) via @octokit/rest, or the `gh repo create` CLI command. See [[github/auth]] for authentication, [[github/repos/settings]] for post-creation configuration, and [[github/repos/clone]] for cloning the new repo locally.
triggers: set up a new project on github
body:
# Create Repository

Create a new GitHub repository for a user or organization.

## gh CLI

```bash
# Create public repo interactively
gh repo create

# Create private repo with specific name
gh repo create my-project --private --description "My new project"

# Create with README and license
gh repo create my-project --public --add-readme --license mit --gitignore Node

# Create in an organization
gh repo create my-org/shared-lib --private --description "Shared library"

# Create from template
gh repo create my-project --template owner/template-repo --public

# Create and clone locally
gh repo create my-project --public --clone

# Create from existing local repo
cd my-local-project
gh repo create --source . --public --push
```

## REST API

```javascript
import { Octokit } from "@octokit/rest";
const octokit = new Octokit({ auth: process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN });

// Create user-owned repo
const { data: repo } = await octokit.repos.createForAuthenticatedUser({
  name: "my-project",
  description: "A new project",
  private: false,
  auto_init: true,          // Create initial commit with README
  gitignore_template: "Node",
  license_template: "mit",
  has_issues: true,
  has_wiki: false,
  has_projects: false,
});
console.log(repo.html_url, repo.clone_url, repo.ssh_url);

// Create org-owned repo
const { data: orgRepo } = await octokit.repos.createInOrg({
  org: "my-org",
  name: "shared-lib",
  description: "Shared library for all teams",
  private: true,
  visibility: "internal",  // internal visibility for Enterprise
  auto_init: true,
  team_id: 12345,  // Grant access to a specific team
});

// Create from template
const { data: fromTemplate } = await octokit.repos.createUsingTemplate({
  template_owner: "my-org",
  template_repo: "project-template",
  owner: "my-org",
  name: "new-from-template",
  description: "Created from template",
  private: true,
  include_all_branches: false,
});
```

```bash
# REST via curl — create user repo
curl -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $GITHUB_TOKEN" \
  -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
  https://api.github.com/user/repos \
  -d '{"name": "my-project", "private": false, "auto_init": true}'

# Create org repo
curl -X POST \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $GITHUB_TOKEN" \
  -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
  https://api.github.com/orgs/my-org/repos \
  -d '{"name": "shared-lib", "private": true}'
```

## Creation Options

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `name` | string | Repository name (required) |
| `description` | string | Short description |
| `private` | boolean | Private repo (default: false) |
| `visibility` | string | `public`, `private`, or `internal` (Enterprise) |
| `auto_init` | boolean | Create initial commit with README |
| `gitignore_template` | string | `.gitignore` template (e.g., "Node", "Python") |
| `license_template` | string | License template (e.g., "mit", "apache-2.0") |
| `has_issues` | boolean | Enable issue tracker |
| `has_wiki` | boolean | Enable wiki |
| `has_projects` | boolean | Enable projects |
| `team_id` | integer | Team to grant access (org repos) |
| `allow_squash_merge` | boolean | Allow squash merging |
| `delete_branch_on_merge` | boolean | Auto-delete head branches after merge |

sections.title: User-owned repositories
sections.body: Use `octokit.repos.createForAuthenticatedUser()` or `gh repo create name`. The authenticated user becomes the owner. Set `private: true` for private repos. Use `auto_init: true` to create with an initial README commit. Combine with `gitignore_template` and `license_template` for a fully initialized repo.

sections.title: Organization repositories
sections.body: Use `octokit.repos.createInOrg()` or `gh repo create org/name`. Requires `admin:org` scope or org membership with repo creation permissions. Set `team_id` to grant a specific team access. Enterprise orgs support `visibility: internal` for repos visible to all org members but not the public.

sections.title: Creating from templates
sections.body: Use `octokit.repos.createUsingTemplate()` or `gh repo create --template owner/repo` to create a new repo from a template repository. Templates copy files, directory structure, and branches. Set `include_all_branches: true` to copy all branches (default copies only the default branch). Templates are ideal for standardized project scaffolding.

links.context: Open PRs against the new repo

related.note: This is a sub-skill of the repos skill
Clone the repo locally after creation
Configure branch protection and settings after creation

scripts.name: Create Repository
